name: freeaitokens
description: OpenAI-compatible local server backed by Playwright browser automation
author: Paul Fruitful

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check server.js && node --check scripts/setup.js && node --check scripts/start.js && node --check src/errors.js && node --check src/chrome-attach.js && node --check src/playwright.js && node --check src/plugin-registry.js && node --check src/session.js && node --check src/client.js && node --check src/plugins/generic-chat.js && node --check src/plugins/chatgpt-web.js && node --check src/plugins/gemini-web.js && node --check src/server/app.js && node --check src/server/openai-format.js && node --check src/server/prompt-builder.js && node --check src/server/browser-client.js && node --check src/server/middleware/error-handler.js && node --check src/server/routes/chat.js && node --check src/server/routes/models.js && node --check examples/chatgpt-web-session.js && node --check examples/gemini-web-session.js
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke
